§6Tiny TNT§f:
The §6Tiny TNT §f(appliedenergistics2:tiny_tnt) is a §6miniature TNT block §f with §breduced explosion power§f. It is a §bcrafting component §f for several AE2 advanced recipes, including the §6Spatial IO §f and the §6Quantum Ring §f.

§6Production Path (misc/tiny_tnt.json)§f:
Pattern "ab / ba" (a 2x2 pattern):
- §ba§f: §6Quartz Dust §f(any dust in the §6#appliedenergistics2:dustQuartz §foredict — covers §6Certus Quartz Dust §f, §6Nether Quartz Dust §f) — 2
- §bb§f: §6Gunpowder §f(minecraft:gunpowder) — 2
- Yields 1× Tiny TNT

§6Function§f:
- §bExplosive §f: when triggered (redstone signal), the Tiny TNT creates a §bsmall §f explosion
- §bExplosion power §f: §b4 §f (vs §b8 §f for vanilla TNT) — a §6small §f crater
- §bCrafting component §f: required for §6Spatial Pylon §f and §6Spatial IO Port §f recipes
- §bNo recipe item §f: the Tiny TNT §bexplodes §f in place; it does not drop as an item

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Tiny TNT is a component of (recipe_count=0 in jei-graph), but it is referenced in 8 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bCrafting §f: §6Spatial Pylon §f, §6Spatial IO Port §f
- §bDemolition §f: small-scale clearing
- §bQuartz Dust sink §f: useful for §bexcess §f dust

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: the Tiny TNT is a §6cheap §f way to dispose of §bexcess §fCertus Quartz Dust
- §eTip§f: pair the Tiny TNT with a §6redstone clock §f for a §6small mining area §f
- §eTip§f: §6Certus Quartz Dust §f and §6Nether Quartz Dust §f are §6interchangeable §f in this recipe
- §cWarning§f: the Tiny TNT is §6not §f a §6sustained §f mining tool; use a §6Tunnel Bore §f or §6Miner §f for serious work
- §cWarning§f: the Tiny TNT §cdestroys §f blocks in the §6explosion radius §f — be careful near §6valuable §f structures
